name: Invoice approval
description: Extract invoice fields, find the matching purchase order, compare totals, and route uncertain or high-impact actions for human approval.

inputs.name: Invoice document
inputs.description: A synthetic invoice document supplied by the user.

variables.name: Invoice number
variables.description: Invoice reference extracted from the document.

variables.name: Purchase order
variables.description: Purchase-order reference extracted from the invoice.

variables.name: Invoice total
variables.description: Total amount shown on the invoice.

variables.name: Purchase-order total
variables.description: Expected total from the matched purchase order.

steps.name: Invoice upload
steps.description: Accept a synthetic invoice document for analysis.

steps.name: AI field extraction
steps.description: Extract supplier, invoice number, purchase order, date, total, and currency with uncertainty retained.

steps.name: Purchase-order lookup
steps.description: Look up the purchase-order record using the extracted reference.

steps.name: Total comparison
steps.description: Compare invoice and purchase-order totals in the same currency.

steps.name: Approval path
steps.description: Prepare the matching invoice for an explicit human approval action.

steps.name: Exception path
steps.description: Draft an exception record when invoice and purchase-order totals differ.

steps.name: Human-review path
steps.description: Request review when required information is missing, unreadable, or uncertain.

decisions.name: Required fields present
decisions.description: Only continue when required fields were extracted confidently.
decisions.condition: invoice_number != null and purchase_order != null and extraction_confidence >= 0.85

decisions.name: Totals match
decisions.description: Route exact total matches to approval and mismatches to an exception draft.

approvals.name: Invoice approval confirmation
approvals.description: A person must confirm the high-impact approval action.

approvals.name: Uncertain data review
approvals.description: A person resolves missing or low-confidence invoice information.

tests.name: Matching invoice
tests.explanation: PO-1001 exists and both totals are 1250.00 USD; the approval gate is reached.

tests.name: Amount mismatch
tests.explanation: The invoice total is 980.00 USD while PO-1002 is 900.00 USD.

tests.name: Missing purchase order
tests.explanation: The purchase-order reference is missing, so lookup cannot proceed safely.

tests.name: Unreadable invoice number
tests.explanation: The invoice number is marked unreadable and requires a person to resolve it.
